message:
test(pijs): add 642-line Node core shim unit test suite (bd-2b9y)

Comprehensive unit tests for the PiJS QuickJS runtime's Node.js core
module shims verifying API compatibility for extensions that import
standard Node modules: node:os, node:path, node:fs, node:url,
node:crypto, and node:child_process.

Covers homedir/tmpdir/hostname/platform/arch/type/release, cpus(),
networkInterfaces(), userInfo(), EOL, totalmem/freemem, path join/
resolve/basename/dirname/extname/isAbsolute/parse/format, fs
existsSync/readFileSync/readdirSync/statSync, URL/URLSearchParams,
randomUUID, createHash, and execSync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
